name: Lyra Windrunner
bio: The swiftest ranger in the realm. Quiet as a shadow, fast as the wind.

name: Valerius the Bold
bio: A legendary knight known for his courage and impeccable armor. Seeking companionship in the Tavern.

name: Elara Brightsoul
bio: A wandering bard with a voice like silver and a heart of gold. Exploring the world one ballad at a time.

name: Thrain Ironfoot
bio: A master blacksmith from the deep mountains. Strength and honor above all else.
